Description

Account
Represents an account with entries.
AccountDetails

Represents an immutable account description.

Represents an Accounting Entry.
AccountingEntryIntf
 
AccountingTransaction
Represents a group of related account entries.

AccountingTransactionBuilderIntf

Dummy SSButtonPanel with two buttons.
AccountingYearPanel.SSDateChooser
Dummy SSDateChooser implemented as a JPanel containing a JTextField.

CreateCompanyPanel
 
DashboardPanel
AccountsActivityPanel displays detailed activity for a selected account.
DashboardService
 
DocumentsPanel
 
DocumentStorageService
DocumentStorageService handles storage and retrieval of documents (e.g., PDFs, JPGs, PNGs) associated with transactions.
DonationsPanel
 
DonorService
 
DonorsPanel
DonorsPanel displays a list of donors along with their donation data.
DonorsPanel.Donor
Donor represents a donor with an ID, name, total donation amount, and last donation date.
DonorsPanel.DonorService
DonorService defines the API for retrieving donor data.
ExcelDataWriter
 
ExcelFormulaApplier
Placeholder for applying spreadsheet-style formulas to evaluated values manually.
ExcelTableReader
 
ExcelWorkbookPage
Represents a page (sheet) of an Excel workbook.
ExportToJsonAction
 
FileBasedDonorService
 
FileBasedGrantsService
FileBasedGrantsService retrieves grant data from a JSON file.
FileUtils
 
FinancialFormulaService
 
FinancialInstitution
 
FinancialReportsWriter
 
FundAccountingService
FundAccountingService handles the account balances for different funds and supports transferring funds between them.
FundsPanel
 
GenerateBalanceSheetAction
 
GenerateIncomeStatementAction
 
GenerateReportPanel
 
GenerateReportsAction
GenerateReportsAction prompts the user to choose a report type, date range, and output format, then generates the specified report using the ReportService.
GenerateTrialBalanceAction
GenerateTrialBalanceAction prompts the user to enter a date range and output format, then generates a trial balance report using the configured ReportService.
GrantsPanel
GrantsPanel displays a list of grants along with their detailed information.
GrantsPanel.Grant
Donor-like model class representing a Grant.
GrantsPanel.GrantsService
GrantsService defines the API for retrieving grant data.

InMemoryChartBuilder
 
InMemoryDocumentStorageService
 
InMemoryFundService
 
InMemoryJournal
 
InMemoryLedger
 
InMemoryReconciliationService
 
InMemorySalesCOGService
 
InMemoryTrialBalanceService
InMemoryTrialBalanceService computes a trial balance for a ledger over a specified date range.
InputFileAction
 
InventoryPanel
 
InventoryService
InventoryService manages inventory items for the nonprofit bookkeeping system.
InventoryService.InventoryItem
Private inner class representing a single inventory item.
InvestmentTransaction
 
Journal
Represents a collection of transactions.

JournalEntry
 
JournalIntf
 
JournalPanel

Represents a set of accounts and their transactions.

OFX
 
Ofx20Writer
Ofx20Writer generates an OFX 2.0 compliant XML file for banking transactions.

Generates OFX 2.0 XML using JAXB-based model classes.

A TabDelimitedReader reads the chart of accounts and transactions from a tab-delimited file.

Transaction
Transaction represents a banking transaction for OFX export.
TransactionService
 
TransactionType
 
TrialBalanceReportWriter
TrialBalanceReportWriter generates a trial balance report as an Excel file.
TrialBalanceResult
TrialBalanceResult computes a ledgerâ€™s trial balance by aggregating the raw balances of all accounts.
TrialBalanceResultIntf
TrialBalanceResultIntf defines the contract for a trial balance result.
TrialBalanceResultIntf
TrialBalanceResultIntf is a concrete implementation representing the results of a trial balance computation.
TrialBalanceService
TrialBalanceResultIntf defines the contract for a trial balance result.
